::: lt-grid

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT1
:::
::: lt-title
Relations & Functions
:::
::: lt-desc
Represent relations as sets, tables, and arrow diagrams, and determine whether a relation is a function using the vertical line test.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Sets & tables]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Arrow diagrams]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Vertical line test]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT2
:::
::: lt-title
Representations
:::
::: lt-desc
Move fluently between tables, graphs, and equations for linear functions.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Table to graph]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Graph to equation]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Multiple representations]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT3
:::
::: lt-title
Domain & Range
:::
::: lt-desc
Identify the domain and range of a relation from a set, table, or graph.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Input & output]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Set notation]{.lt-skill .c3}
[From graph]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT4
:::
::: lt-title
Linear Functions
:::
::: lt-desc
Identify, evaluate, and interpret linear functions in real-world contexts.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Evaluate $f(x)$]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Identify linear]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Interpret context]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT5
:::
::: lt-title
Slope & Rate of Change
:::
::: lt-desc
Calculate slope from two points or a table and interpret it as a rate of change in context.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Slope formula]{.lt-skill .c5}
[From a table]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Rate of change]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT6
:::
::: lt-title
Linear Equations & Graphs
:::
::: lt-desc
Write and graph linear equations; find equations of parallel and perpendicular lines.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Slope-intercept]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Parallel lines]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Perpendicular lines]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT7
:::
::: lt-title
Linear Modelling
:::
::: lt-desc
Form, solve, and interpret linear models for real-world situations.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Form the model]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Solve & predict]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Interpret results]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT8
:::
::: lt-title
Quadratic Functions
:::
::: lt-desc
Identify quadratic functions, evaluate them, and convert between vertex, standard, and factored forms.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Vertex form]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Standard form]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Factored form]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT9
:::
::: lt-title
Key Features of Graphs
:::
::: lt-desc
Determine the vertex, roots, and axis of symmetry of a parabola from its equation or graph.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Vertex]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Roots / x-intercepts]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Axis of symmetry]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT12
:::
::: lt-title
Domain & Range — Quadratic
:::
::: lt-desc
Determine and interpret the domain and range of a quadratic function from its equation or graph.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Domain: all reals]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Range from vertex]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Opens up or down]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT13
:::
::: lt-title
Quadratic Modelling
:::
::: lt-desc
Model and interpret real-world situations using quadratic functions, including projectile motion and revenue problems.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Projectile motion]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Revenue problems]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Interpret vertex]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

:::
